principle: Create visual groups through spacing differentials alone — tighter gap groups elements, larger gap separates them — no borders or backgrounds required
explanation: X.ux|gestalt_proximity: visual_grouping == gap_differential NOT borders+backgrounds; small_gap(8px) -> same_group; large_gap(32-48px) -> new_group; proximity_overrides_color+shape; eg: "label+input gap:8px, sections gap:40px" vs "all_gaps:16px_everywhere_no_groups"
